description_long: This is a modern, single-family house situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway connecting to a main road. The house features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with white exterior walls and large windows, suggesting an emphasis on natural light. The property is bordered by a road on one side and a blue area, likely representing water or a pool, on the opposite side. The landscaping is minimal, with a flat grassy lawn surrounding the house and no visible fencing or elaborate garden features. The main entrance is accessible via a paved path from the driveway, and the house appears to have a garage or carport integrated into its structure. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with large windows, set on a grassy plot with a driveway and adjacent water feature. The design is clean and geometric, emphasizing simplicity and natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the house centered on a grassy plot with the road in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway leading to the house and the blue water feature at the rear edge of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the house with the water feature in the foreground and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, house, and the water feature on the left, with the road on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved path, and no porch or decorative columns; minimalistic and functional.
